name: Gemini 3.5 Pro
description: Gemini 3.5 Pro is Google's announced frontier Gemini 3.5 model for complex, agentic workflows. Google introduced the Gemini 3.5 family at I/O 2026 and said Pro was already in internal use with rollout planned after the initial 3.5 Flash release.

details.name: availability
details.value: Announced at Google I/O 2026; Google said rollout was planned after the 3.5 Flash launch.
